summary: Frontend-only regression + iteration-4 visual/parallax additions verified on Blayake landing page at desktop 1920x1080. All new features work: hero parallax visual card, image-marquee, StudioReel section with horizontal BUILT IN PUBLIC parallax + bg image parallax, Work section with 4 rows including HALCYON LABS and proper hover dim. Iteration-3 Services dim bug is FIXED (animate now drives opacity through Framer Motion). 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Blayake.jsx is now ~894 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline ceiling. Recommend splitting into per-section components (Hero, Marquee, StudioReel, Services, Work, Faq, Contact, Footer) under /app/frontend/src/pages/blayake/ for maintainability.

Marquee `keys` use array index `i` for duplicated stream entries — fine for a static list but if items become dynamic this will cause unstable keys. Consider `${item}-${i}` if items become reorderable.
Lenis smooth-scroll is initialised but framer-motion's useScroll defaults to window scroll — works because Lenis writes to native scroll, but worth documenting. No bug.
REEL_IMG and HERO_IMG are eager/lazy mixed; HERO_IMG uses loading="eager" which is correct for above-the-fold. Marquee + Reel images are lazy — verified images loaded after scroll-into-view.

verified_checks.hero_visual: visible=true, image present, STUDIO_001/REC/v3·Autonomous Ops labels all rendered
verified_checks.image_marquee: 21 images rendered in track; 6 labels (AUTOMATION, DESIGN, BUILD, CONTENT, DEPLOY, RESULTS) each appearing 3x in 3-stream loop
verified_checks.studio_reel: reel-cta href=#work; STUDIO_REEL — 2026 corner label visible; BUILT IN PUBLIC text rendered
verified_checks.work_rows: 4 rows (work-row-0..3), HALCYON LABS / HEALTH visible at row-3
verified_checks.work_hover_dim: hovering work-row-1: r0=0.3, r1=1, r2=0.3, r3=0.3 (computed opacity) — dim effect works
verified_checks.service_hover_dim: hovering service-row-02: opacities=[0.25, 1, 0.25, 0.25, 0.25] — iteration-3 dim bug FIXED
verified_checks.cursor_label: cursor-ring innerText='DISCOVER' on service hover; cursor-dot + cursor-ring mount on desktop
verified_checks.hero_parallax_y: image inline transform changes from translateY(0)/none at scroll=0 to translateY(83.33px) scale(1.056) at scroll=500 — vertical parallax works
verified_checks.reel_title_parallax_x: BUILT IN PUBLIC. translateX: 5.46% (before) -> -5.88% (top) -> -16.25% (mid) -> -23.38% (end) — horizontal parallax works
verified_checks.contact: contact-email pill, contact-x pill, form-phone input all present

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fully verified on desktop 1920x1080. Lenis smooth-scroll requires waiting ~1500ms after window.scrollTo({behavior:'instant'}) for framer-motion useScroll/useTransform values to settle. To sample motion-driven transforms, query the deepest element with matching textContent (use direct text-node filter) — querying by textContent.trim() picks ancestors first. hero-visual is hidden below lg breakpoint (lg:block class). Backend not retested — last green at iteration_2/test_blayake_api.py.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no bugs found this iteration. Iteration-3 dim-effect bug RCA confirmed fixed: code now uses `animate={{ opacity: dim ? 0.25 : 1, y: 0 }}` on the motion.button (single source of truth via Framer Motion), and the conflicting Tailwind opacity-30/opacity-100 className was removed. Verified via getComputedStyle: non-active service rows show opacity=0.25, active=1; non-active work rows show opacity=0.3, active=1.
